name: Fromage Blanc Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Heavy cream (whip to stiff peaks)
recipeInstructions:
CRUST - Combine the first four ingredients until well coated with butter. Press into the bottom of molds.
FILLING - Chill. Combine 1 cup sugar and Fromage Blanc in a large bowl, whisk over a hot water bath until sugar has dissolved. Squeeze all water out of gelatin sheets and add to warm Fromage Blanc mixture, stirring until gelatin has dissolved. Cool slightly over a water bath until slightly thickened. Whip yolks in a mixer with the second cup of sugar until thick and pale, fold into the Fromage Blanc mixture. Fold in whipped cream. Fill 4-inch ring molds, smooth tops and chill until set.
Serve with STRAWBERRY MINT SALS
